default_rules.name: URL file extension restricted by policy
default_rules.description: Blocks requests for file extensions commonly associated with sensitive files. Override list_items to customize. CRS 920440.

default_rules.name: HTTP header restricted by policy
default_rules.description: Blocks requests containing restricted HTTP headers that are not expected in normal traffic. Override list_items to customize. Proxy headers (via, x-forwarded-for, x-forwarded-host) excluded — they are standard behind reverse proxies (Cloudflare, nginx, etc.). CRS 920450.
